changelog: Fix Cloudflare 403s from kids-in-mind and parentpreviews: omit the ALPN extension from the TLS handshake (they block JA4 t13d1212, allow t13d1211). Supersedes 0.0.9 which was mis-released without the fix.
description: Calculates a PR rating for library items and applies PR-## tags, with a Vault tag for top-tier items.
name: PR Rating
